next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Excisional biopsy of an enlarged lymph node if EBUS-TBNA is nondiagnostic
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and soluble IL-2 receptor levels
Comprehensive infectious disease workup including fungal cultures and acid-fast bacilli staining
Cardiac MRI to evaluate for cardiac sarcoidosis given the syncopal episodes and history of CAD
